gender.evidence: Agent: Mam good evening... Customer: Haanji.

city.evidence: Customer: Main Gurgaon se bol rahi hun.

state.evidence: Customer: Main Gurgaon se bol rahi hun. (Implied Haryana)

dependents.evidence: Customer: Ji abhi ek saal do saal ke hain.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Haanji, matlab tabhi unko samjha dena na, woh zyada acche se samajh jayenge, fir wohi decide karenge karna hai ya nahi karna hai, jaisa bhi hai.

objections.quote: Bhaiya, iske liye main kuch decision lungi, main husband se puch ke hi lungi.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: ...bank aapko ek child plan offer kar raha hai.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: ...fir wohi decide karenge karna hai ya nahi karna hai, jaisa bhi hai.

agent_promises: 30 percent cash bonus in saving account from first year
35,000 rupees payout for 5 years after 5 years

product_fit.mismatch_reason: The agent is misrepresenting a child insurance plan as a high-return savings scheme with guaranteed cash bonuses.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about existing insurance or financial goals beyond the child plan.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is open to discussing the plan with her husband and requested a callback at a specific time.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced himself as calling from Central Bank of India to offer a child plan, and the customer responded with interest.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was passive and polite, listening to the pitch and deferring the final decision to her husband.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer requested a callback for the next day so she could consult her husband about the plan.
call_narrative.ending: The agent confirmed a callback for the next day at 11 AM to speak with the customer and her husband.

key_quotes: Bhaiya, iske liye main kuch decision lungi, main husband se puch ke hi lungi.
Aap mujhe kar lena 11-12 baje ke aas paas.
